logger.message: #["[SPLUNK] Event pushed | HTTP Status: " ++ (attributes.statusCode as String)]
logger.doc:name: Log Splunk Response

logger.message: #["[SPLUNK] Failed to push event to Splunk HEC | Error: " ++ error.description]
logger.doc:name: Log Splunk Push Failure

ee:transform.doc:name: Build Splunk Event - File Not Found

logger.message: #["[INVENTORY-SYNC] FILE NOT FOUND event sent to Splunk | File: " ++ vars.expectedFileName]
logger.doc:name: Log Alert Sent

logger.message: #["[INVENTORY-SYNC] INVALID RECORDS event sent to Splunk | Count: " ++ (result.failedRecords as String)]
logger.doc:name: Log Alert Sent

logger.message: #["[INVENTORY-SYNC] SYSTEM ERROR event sent to Splunk | Error: " ++ (error.description default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Alert Sent

logger.message: #["[INVENTORY-SYNC] JOB SUCCESS event sent to Splunk | Records: " ++ (result.totalRecords as String)]
logger.doc:name: Log Success Sent
